sourceRef.citation: Kourovka Notebook, Problem 20.17 (Khukhro & Mazurov eds., ed.20)

statement.latex: The normal covering number$(G)$of a finite non-cyclic group$G$is the minimum number of proper subgroups of$G$such that$G$is the union of their conjugates. [r]{ (ae)} What is the exact value of \$_{n\ } (S_n)/n$? [r]{(ao)} What is the exact value of \$_{n\ } (S_n)/n$? Comment of 2025: It belongs to$[1/12,\,1/6]$for$n$odd (S.\,Eberhard, C.\,Mellon, Bull. London Math. Soc. (2025), ). [r]{(b)} What ar...
